notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Wenceel Pérez steals (1) 2nd base. Wenceel Pérez to 3rd. Wenceel Pérez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Danny Jansen.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter flies out to right fielder Ezequiel Duran.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds into a double play, third baseman Hao-Yu Lee to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Corey Seager out at 2nd. Joc Pederson out at 1st.
